entities.window: a house window with a crack spreading

scenes.title: The Broken Window
scenes.background_prompt: A suburban front yard with a brick house, a large window, a trimmed hedge, and a mowed lawn. Afternoon light. No people, no balls.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A suburban front yard on a clear afternoon. A brick house with a large ground-floor window faces the lawn. A black and white soccer ball is captured mid-air, just after impact with the window — a web of cracks radiates from the point of contact, sharp lines spreading across the glass like a frozen spider web. A few small shards have already broken free and tumble through the air. The ball bounces backward off the window, slightly deformed from the impact. On the mowed lawn, a makeshift goal made of two backpacks sits about ten meters from the window, revealing how the ball went astray. A trimmed hedge lines the front of the house, and the front door — painted red — is closed. The scene captures the exact moment of consequence.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place ball mid-air just after impact with the window, a web of cracks radiating from the contact point. A few small shards tumbling through the air. Ball bouncing backward slightly deformed.
